Building Permits


The Division of Building Safety is charged with the responsibility of reviewing plans, issuing permits and performing inspections for vertical construction to ensure compliance with the Florida Building Codes and local construction ordinances. The types of permit that we issue are building, electrical, gas, mechanical, plumbing, and roofing.

Only building records associated with an address will return. If you need to find all records on a parcel, use the Property search. Additionally, you can search for permits issued prior to June 4th, 2012 using our Historical Permit Search.

If you have questions about Orange County's Building Permits, please call the Division of Building Safety at 836-5550.


 Help
Street must be 3 or more characters. Street Number Required.
Case/Ref Number must be 6 or more characters.
Date range exceeds six months.

** Date only search causes validation, click Search again after validating
** Maximum date range allowed for search is 6 months

Orange County Government is committed to providing access to all individuals, with or without disabilities, seeking information on its website, fasttrack.ocfl.net. To provide this information, the site is built to comply with Section 508 of the U.S. Rehabilitation Act (as amended), and Florida Administrative Code (FAC) Rule: 60-8.002. W3C Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) were followed to ensure our information is accessible.

If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader, eye tracking device, voice recognition software, etc.) and have difficulties accessing information on fasttrack.ocfl.net, please contact us at (407) 836-8181 or publicrecordrequest@ocfl.net and provide the URL (web address) of the material you tried to access, the problem you experienced, and your contact information.
